response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile hands-on engineer with broad full-stack, embedded, and open-source founder experience, but this role is a director-level individual contributor focused on AI platform strategy. There is a substantial seniority gap (Senior/Staff Developer vs. Principal/Director-level), and the resume shows little evidence of recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale, or the strategic advisory and thought-leadership scope the role demands. Recent MCP/agent-tooling work is promising but early-stage and not at the depth required.
strengths: Broad multi-language full-stack, mobile, and embedded engineering experience
Entrepreneurial founder of an open-source geo-data platform (GISCollective)
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work
concerns: Limited recognized AI expertise; no demonstrated AI products/platforms at scale
No advanced degree and no evidence of strategic customer/partner advisory scope
